nasb.text: Immediately, when the entire crowd saw Him, they were amazed and began running up to greet Him.

esv.text: And immediately all the crowd, when they saw him, were greatly amazed and ran up to him and greeted him.

cnv.text: 眾人看見了耶穌，都很驚奇，就跑上前去向他問安。

ccb.text: 大家一看到耶稣，都十分惊奇，立刻跑上去迎接祂。

csbs.text: 众人一见耶稣，都大吃一惊，就跑过去欢迎他。
